title: Opening for Financial Analyst at ICICI Bank

jsonLd.title: Opening for Financial Analyst at ICICI Bank
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Bank invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Bank:
ICICI Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
